feat.name: Certain Strategem
feat.text: You know exactly where to strike a foe to target their weak spots. When you make a Strike that you're adding your Intelligence modifier to due to Devising a Stratagem and miss, you deal half of your strategic strike damage to the target. This damage type is that of the weapon or unarmed attack you used for the Strike.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.
